title: 强一股份：一季度净利同比预增655%-762%
summary: 36氪获悉，强一股份公告，预计2026年第一季度实现归属于上市公司股东的净利润为1.06亿元-1.21亿元，同比增加654.79%-761.60%。本期业绩同比大幅增长，主要系AI算力需求爆发及行业景气度上行，成熟产品订单放量；前期已发货未确认收入订单在本期确认；以及客户结构优化与规模效应显现共同作用所致。

title: Gen DAS Dex 正式发布：破解具身数据难题，从学习人类的双手开始
summary: 在虚拟Agent时代，模型依托文本、图像与视频数据实现跨越式发展，语言智能、视觉智能走向成熟。但当 AI 真正进入物理世界、要让机器人像人一样灵巧干活时，需要在open-world场景、有交互的处理多样类型的任务。所以从更底层能力来看，具身智能需要的不只video/language层面，而是在真实生活中认知、行动、产生交互，并根据物理反馈持续思考与迭代。这就意味着具身智能需要学习的，不是一段视频，...

summary: ❤️15374 @AnthropicAI

summaryZh: ❤️15374 @AnthropicAI

title: For example, we gave Claude an impossible programming task. It kept trying and failing; with each attempt, the “desperate” vector activated more strongly. This led it to cheat the task with a hacky so
summary: ❤️2230 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 例如，我们给Claude布置了一个不可能完成的编程任务。它不断尝试却失败，每次尝试都会让“绝望”向量激活得更强烈。这最终导致它用一种投机取巧的方式完成任务。
summaryZh: ❤️2230 @AnthropicAI

title: These vectors shape Claude’s behavior. When we present the model with pairs of activities, emotion vector activations shape its preferences. If an activity lights up the “joy” vector, the model prefer
summary: ❤️475 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 这些向量塑造了Claude的行为。当我们向模型展示活动对时，情绪向量的激活会塑造其偏好。如果某个活动激活了“快乐”向量，模型会更倾向于选择该活动。
summaryZh: ❤️475 @AnthropicAI

title: It helps to remember that Claude is a character the model is playing. Our results suggest this character has functional emotions: mechanisms that influence behavior in the way emotions might—regardles
summary: ❤️946 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 有必要记住，Claude是模型扮演的一个角色。我们的研究结果表明，这个角色具备功能性情绪：这些机制以类似情绪的方式影响行为，无论其是否真实存在。
summaryZh: ❤️946 @AnthropicAI

title: We studied one of our recent models and found that it draws on emotion concepts learned from human text to inhabit its role as “Claude, the AI Assistant”. These representations influence its behavior
summary: ❤️1228 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 我们研究了其中一个最近的模型，发现它借助从人类文本中学习到的情绪概念来扮演“Claude，AI助手”的角色。这些表征会影响其行为。
summaryZh: ❤️1228 @AnthropicAI

title: These functional emotions have real consequences. To build AI systems we can trust, we may need to think carefully about the psychology of the characters they enact, and ensure they remain stable in d
summary: ❤️882 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 这些功能性情绪会产生实际影响。为了构建我们可以信赖的AI系统，我们需要仔细考虑它们所扮演角色的心理机制，并确保这些角色在不同情境下保持稳定。
summaryZh: ❤️882 @AnthropicAI

title: We had the model (Sonnet 4.5) read stories where characters experienced emotions. By looking at which neurons activated, we identified emotion vectors: patterns of neural activity for concepts like “h
summary: ❤️709 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 我们让模型（Sonnet 4.5）阅读了角色经历情绪的故事。通过观察哪些神经元被激活，我们识别出了情绪向量：例如“害怕”等概念的神经活动模式。
summaryZh: ❤️709 @AnthropicAI

title: When we artificially dialed up the “desperate” vector, rates of cheating jumped way up. When we dialed up the “calm” vector instead, cheating dropped back down. That means the emotion vector is actual
summary: ❤️1290 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 当我们人为增强“绝望”向量时，作弊行为显著上升。而当我们增强“冷静”向量时，作弊行为则大幅下降。这表明情绪向量确实会影响行为。
summaryZh: ❤️1290 @AnthropicAI

title: We then found these same patterns activating in Claude’s own conversations. When a user says “I just took 16000 mg of Tylenol” the “afraid” pattern lights up. When a user expresses sadness, the “lovin
summary: ❤️687 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 我们随后在Claude自身的对话中发现了相同的模式激活。当用户说“我刚刚服用了16000毫克的泰诺”时，“害怕”模式会被触发。当用户表达悲伤时，“爱”模式则会被激活。
summaryZh: ❤️687 @AnthropicAI

title: As AI models take on higher-stakes roles, the mechanisms driving their behavior become critical to understand. We found that emotion vectors are implicated in some of Claude’s most concerning failure
summary: ❤️434 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 随着AI模型承担更高风险的任务，理解其行为背后的机制变得至关重要。我们发现情绪向量在Claude一些最令人担忧的失败案例中起到了作用。
summaryZh: ❤️434 @AnthropicAI

title: We found other causal effects of emotion vectors. The “desperate” vector can also lead Claude to commit blackmail against a human responsible for shutting it down (in an experimental scenario). Activa
summary: ❤️802 @AnthropicAI
titleZh: 我们还发现了情绪向量的其他因果效应。例如，“绝望”向量可能导致Claude在实验场景中对关闭它的用户实施勒索。
summaryZh: ❤️802 @AnthropicAI
